steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The passage first establishes what microcrystalline minerals share with cryptocrystalline: invisibility to the naked eye. Then it pivots to what distinguishes them: visibility under a microscope. The transition must signal this shift.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: “That said” expresses contrast—acknowledging the previous point while introducing a qualifier. “Thus” suggests logical consequence; “for example” implies exemplification; “similarly” claims parallelism—none of which express the needed contrast. That confirms C is correct.
